title: jibbs modpack
description: Cobblemon, Create, and Terralith with data packs to enhance gameplay, and additional mods to increase performance.
body:
Should download because it enhances Cobblemon through the addition of Create, and Terralith with many side mods for game optimization and improved functionality.

Cobblemon is the main mod Pokemon in Minecraft, with Terralith added to enhance the vanilla world generating much better biomes. Create helps add more technology to the mod while keeping the original vanilla aesthetic and helping to automate farms.

The additional side mods are added for performance and to enhance the vanilla experience.
